failure.message: AssertionError: assert None is not None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf81c296707c0>('contract') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf81c296707c0> = {'contract': None}.get + where {'contract': None} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json
